chapter_title.en: Chapter 90 – The shade for the one in Ihraam

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/305)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/305)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْمُحْرِمِ أَ يَتَغَطَّى قَالَ أَمَّا مِنَ الْحَرِّ وَ الْبَرْدِ فَلَا .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Aban, from Zurara who said,
‘I asked himasws about the one in Ihraam, can he cover himself?’ Heasws said: ‘As for, from the heat and the cold, so no’.
en.sarwar: 13. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla’ ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Ali from Aban from Zurarah who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man in the state of Ihram if he can cover himself. He (the Imam) said, ‘From heat or cold, however, he cannot cover himself.’”
